name: sonar-review
description: Run a Sonar scan against just-changed code on the current branch and produce a structured compliance report — quality-gate verdict, then severity-tagged findings (blocker/critical/major/minor/info) with file:line, Sonar rule ID, category (bug/vulnerability/hotspot/code smell), why it matters, and concrete fix. Works against both SonarQube server (self-hosted) and SonarCloud (SaaS) — mode is detected from `sonar-project.properties`. Use before opening a PR, when CI shows a failed gate, or whenever the user asks 'is this Sonar-compliant?'.
